title: Xenial Dense Polish Bread Bake
description: A yeasty, dense, romantic Polish dish featuring Thai red curry paste, double-rise-bread, and low-sodium-friendly ingredients, baked in a fondue pot.
instructions: Preheat the fondue pot to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large mixing bowl, combine flour, yeast, curry paste, salt, and sugar.
In a separate bowl, whisk together eggs, milk, and melted butter.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 10 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover it with a damp cloth, and let it rise in a warm place for 1 hour.
Punch down the dough and shape it into a round loaf.
Place the loaf in the preheated fondue pot and bake for 35 minutes.
Let the bread cool for 10 minutes before slicing and serving.
